title: My Weekend at Dad's
body:
This weekend was pretty chill. On Friday, we went to my dad's girlfriend's house to take her daughter to the doctor to check her baby bump because she's pregnant. After the appointment, we went back to her house and hung out for about an hour before we had to leave. Then we went to Chili's and ate dinner together. After that, we went back to my uncle's house where my dad lives, took showers, and laid down to watch a movie — but I mostly played Roblox instead.

On Saturday, we stayed inside all day because his girlfriend was going through a lot at the time and didn't want us coming over. So we just had a relaxed day at the house. Later we went to this diner and I got a burrito — it was really good! Then we stopped at Dollar General and picked up some snacks before heading back home. We took showers and I went to bed around 11:00 PM. I was really tired.

On Sunday, I came home to my mom's house. Every time I come home from my dad's, he gets me and my brother McDonald's — it's kind of our tradition. After we got home, we just stayed in and I went to bed around midnight because I was watching TV like I usually do.

That was my weekend! Nothing too crazy, but it was nice and calm.

title: All About Me!
body:
Hey Dad! I wanted to do an "All About Me" entry so you can get to know me a little better. I'm 13 years old and my favorite color is purple. My number one best friend is Lilyah — she's always been there for me.

The things that make me happy are my friends, my family, God, and food (especially Dr Pepper — that's my favorite drink!). My favorite part about myself is my attitude... sometimes, haha. When I grow up, I want to be a teacher. I think it would be really cool to help kids learn.

Right now I have a crush on Saulo. He might be a bad person but I still love him — I can't help it! But I'm working on making good choices.

Some of my goals for when school starts:
- Get better grades
- Have a better attitude
- Don't get into drama
- Drop the bad friends
- Be more kind
- Be more confident in others and myself
- Don't backtalk people or fight anyone
- Ignore drama
- Get a glow up
- Get better style

My favorite song right now is "Go Away" by Weezer! My favorite TV show is Ginny & Georgia. My favorite game to play is Brookhaven on Roblox. My hobbies are swimming, spending time with family and friends, going on walks, playing Roblox, and watching TV. My favorite YouTubers right now are Sam and Colby!

And that's all about me! Love you, Dad 💜
highlights: Fav song: Go Away by Weezer
10 goals for the new school year
goals: Be more confident in others and myself
Don't backtalk people or fight anyone

title: A Lot Going On
body:
Hey Dad. Alot's going on right now and I just need to get it out.

I feel like my mom's sad and I don't want her to be. I don't want to say too much on here tbh, but it's just the money situation. Apparently my mom has "too much money" but some of that money goes to me and my brother for child support. I just feel bad for my mom getting treated like that. Dad needs to stop being like that — just bc his girlfriend suggests stuff don't mean he has to do everything she wants to do.

Now that I think about it, I don't want Dad to get full custody tbh. At first I did, idk why, but I just did. But then I realized my mom and dad both are great parents. Sometimes they make bad choices, but that's normal — everyone makes mistakes.

But sometimes I just feel like it's my fault bc I'll hear stuff from my mom and then go tell my dad, then hear stuff from my dad and then go tell my mom. Bc idk how to be trusted. And I'm really sorry for that.

I'm really sad inside sometimes. I just don't know what to do anymore atp. Sometimes I just wish my life was easier, but yk sometimes that don't happen. But ig that's normal.

I just am sorry for everything, Mom and Dad, and I really mean it. I love yall both alot. But Lord, alots going on rn — a little too much. I hate this but it happens.

All I gotta say is ig stop telling me your business if you always say "mind your business" bc if you tell me your business ima just keep asking and asking. So I'm just sorry..
